blended.narrative: Apex Mountain is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 1,830 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.1" of snow, highs of 25°F. Expect powder.
Thursday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
